label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which option is correct based on the text. The question is asking what the text suggests. Let me read through the passage again to make sure I understand the key points. The text talks about Zhao Wenxuan, a Taiwanese film star. He became interested in films as a child and later worked in an airline before entering acting by chance. He got a role in the film "Wedding Feast" after answering an ad. This film was a hit, winning awards like the German Golden Bear and entering Oscar competition. It was the first Taiwan film allowed in the U.S. Because of this film, he became popular in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Southeast Asia. Now looking at the options: A) "Wedding Feast" is just an ordinary film. But the text says it was a hit and won awards. So A is probably wrong. B) The film disappointed people. No, the text says the opposite. It was successful. So B is incorrect. C) Zhao became famous because of "Wedding Feast". The text says thanks to the film, he became popular. So C seems correct. D) A lot of Taiwan films are shown in the U.S. every year.
